title: SEC sues Mining Automatic and founder over alleged $22M crypto mining scheme
summary: The SEC alleges Mining Automatic and its founder raised $22 million from investors by promising guaranteed crypto mining returns while spending only a fraction of the funds on mining operations.

title: Exodus to cut 25% of staff in company reorganization
summary: The wallet company said it expected the layoffs to generate between $10 million and $13 million in savings as part of its strategy to build a full-stack card issuance and payments platform.

title: S&P Slips as Apple, Tesla Keep Broader Chipmaker Gains in Check
summary: The S&P 500 Index erased early gains to finish lower as a decline in Apple Inc. and Tesla Inc. offset advances elsewhere. Chipmakers rebounded ahead of a deluge of earnings reports that will test whether Big Tech’s profits can match high expectations.

title: Netflix Taps US High-Grade Bond Market With $1 Billion Debt Sale
summary: Netflix Inc. is set to raise $1 billion from a US high-grade bond sale, its first since a debut deal two years ago, as slowing sales growth fuels investor scrutiny of the company’s future.

title: Metaplanet’s Bitcoin Japan Announces Plan to Scoop Up Coins Despite Market Downturn
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Metaplanet’s Bitcoin Japan Announces Plan to Scoop Up Coins Despite Market Downturn 
Metaplanet subsidiary Bitcoin Japan is starting a crypto treasury. 
This post Metaplanet’s Bitcoin Japan Announces Plan to Scoop Up Coins Despite Market Downturn  first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine

title: Bitcoin-Treasury Capital B Plans 10-for-1 Reverse Stock Split for September
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoin-Treasury Capital B Plans 10-for-1 Reverse Stock Split for September
Capital B will execute a 10-for-1 reverse stock split in September as the Paris-listed bitcoin treasury company looks to attract more institutional investors while continuing to build its 3,139 BTC reserve.

title: Russia's First Comprehensive Crypto Law Is Two Votes Away From Passing
summary: The bill licenses exchanges, caps retail investors at about $3,800 a year, and creates a legal pathway for Russian companies to pay foreign partners in crypto—bypassing Western sanctions.

title: Cardano Triggers Hard Fork With First Community-Voted Upgrade
summary: For the first time in Cardano's history, no company flipped the switch on a major protocol update.

title: Trump’s crypto ethics stance leaves Clarity Act negotiations in limbo
summary: A meeting last week to discuss an ethics provision to address President Trump's vast crypto wealth has become something of a black box.

title: Vietnam sets new crypto trading fines on par with drunk-driving penalties
summary: Domestic investors who trade crypto without going through a licensed service provider face fines of roughly $1,140 to $1,900.

title: Burnham becomes UK prime minister promising ‘unity and positivity’
summary: The former mayor of Greater Manchester succeeds Keir Starmer with vow to tackle the cost of living

title: Andy Burnham makes more appointments for his first cabinet
summary: John Healey becomes chancellor while Shabana Mahmood stays at the home office and Ed Miliband moves to the foreign office
